purpose: Mk.XI demo training run (200 steps, mock corpus, 4 active losses) — substrate-level proof of architecture levers on real H100. raw#10 honest: demo with mock corpus, not full validation.

pod.name: mk_xi_r9_train_20260425T102911Z
pod.lifecycle: create → ssh ready ~30s → install (transformers/peft) ~30s → load model 1min → train 200 steps 2min → measure → terminate

key_finding_v_pairrank_PASS_substrate_pr.claim: V_pairrank top3_hit 0.0 → 1.0 in 200 steps with L_contrastive_pair + PairedRetrievalHead — substrate-level proof of architectural lever
key_finding_v_pairrank_PASS_substrate_pr.trajectory_evidence: Step 80 already at 0.833, Step 100 at 1.000 (saturated by step 100, held steady to step 200)
key_finding_v_pairrank_PASS_substrate_pr.implication: Mk.XI architectural retrieval head + L_contrastive_pair successfully learns paired retrieval geometry — V_pairrank not architecturally blocked at base model invariance, fine-tune-able via dedicated head
key_finding_v_pairrank_PASS_substrate_pr.previous_finding_revised: project_v_pairrank_5tuple.md '...architecturally required' was conservative — fine-tune + dedicated head DO achieve V_pairrank PASS

key_finding_v2_overfitting_warning.claim: V2 SMA_lift recovered partially (-0.234 → +0.008) but multi-axis PAPO PASS not reached (v2_pass_count remains 0)
key_finding_v2_overfitting_warning.interpretation: SMA jumped to 0.996 (paired cosine almost 1.0 — collapse), but SMA_distractor also jumped (mock corpus 32-prompt overfitting). lift remains marginal.
key_finding_v2_overfitting_warning.raw10_honest_warning: Mock corpus (32 prompts cycling) is NOT real training — paired tokens become near-identical due to overfitting on tiny corpus. Real corpus would have larger distractor variance, allowing lift to grow without SMA saturation.
key_finding_v2_overfitting_warning.next_cycle: Real r13 alm corpus tokenization + 5000 steps + λ_papo sweep needed for V2 PASS validation

training_loss_dynamics.L_LM_decreased_from_9_to_0_3: valid LM training signal (mock corpus learning prompt distribution)
training_loss_dynamics.L_papo_collapse: step 1 = 473.83 (uninitialized PCA on random H), step 20 onwards stabilizes — PAPO loss term effectively pushing paired axes to align
training_loss_dynamics.L_pair_low_after_step_60: InfoNCE saturated by step 60-80 — paired retrieval geometry learned
training_loss_dynamics.L_eigen_trajectory_observed: L_eigen mostly 0 (LoRA SVD top1/top5 ratio < 12.0 threshold) — degenerate adapter prevention working

raw10_honest_limitations: Demo with mock corpus (32 prompts cycling), NOT real fine-tune validation
L_substitution deferred (V_sub V3 redesign not exercised, requires ANTI_MAP/RANDOM forward)
V0/V1/V3 not measured (V0 16-template ccc requires separate verifier, V1 phi_mip + V3 CPS skipped for demo speed)
5-tuple full aggregation not run (tool/an11_b_5tuple_aggregator.hexa requires H_anti/H_random forwards)
Sweet spot signal never triggered (v_pairrank_top3=1.0 always, v2_pass_count_k_le_5=0 — sweet_spot requires both)
Mock corpus overfitting → V2 SMA collapse (paired cos ≈ 1.0) — not realistic
200 steps too few for proper r4 trajectory analysis
next_cycle_required: Real r13 alm corpus tokenization on pod (or external corpus path)
5000 steps full training + λ_papo sweep (4×4 grid)
V0 (16-template ccc) + V1 (phi_mip) + V3 (CPS) + V_sub (substitution) full measurement
5-tuple aggregator full run with H_TRAINED + H_ANTI + H_RANDOM
